name: Product Equivalents
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Baking powder; 1/4 teaspoon baking soda + 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------DAIRY-----------------------------------
2 cups Butter; or any fat; 1 lb
4 1/2 cups Cheese; grated, 1 lb
4 cups Shredded cheese; 1 lb
1 cup Egg whites; 8-10
1 cup Egg yolks; 12-14
1 cup Cream; whipped, 2 cups
1 cup Sour milk; 1 cup sweet milk
1 tablespoon vinegar/lemon juice; -
1 cup Sweet milk; 1 cup buttermilk/
1 cup Sour milk + 1/2 teaspoon baking soda
1 cup Heavy cream; 1/3 cup butter + 2/3 cups milk
----------------------------------PRODUCE----------------------------------
3 cups Raisins; 1 lb
2 2/3 cups Dates, pitted; 1 lb
1 1/2 cups Pitted cut dates; 1 lb whole
3 1/2 cups Dates, unpitted; 1 lb
1 cup Bananas, mashed; 3 medium
4 cups Nuts (chopped)
---------------------------------SEASONING---------------------------------
1 tablespoon Instant minced onion, rehydrated; 1 small fresh onion
4 cups Onions
1/8 teaspoon Garlic powder; 1 clove garlic
1 teaspoon Dried herbs; 1 tablespoon fresh
1 tablespoon Dijon mustard; 1 teaspoon dry mustard
2 tablespoons Cocoa = 1 chocolate square; 1 oz Chocolate
1 oz Chocolate; 3-4 tablespoons cocoa + 1/2 tablespoon fat
-----------------------------------PASTA-----------------------------------
4 ounces Dry noodles; 2 cups cooked
1 cup Uncooked macaroni; 2-2/3 cups cooked
4 ounces Uncooked macaroni; 2 1/4 cups cooked
1 cup Uncooked rice; 4 cups cooked
1 pound Rice; 2 cups raw, 6 cups cooked
1 cup Uncooked spaghetti; 2 cups cooked
7 ounces Spaghetti; 4 cups cooked
--------------------------------BAKED GOODS--------------------------------
2 cups Cracker crumbs; 28 saltines
3/4 cup Cracker crumbs; 1 cup bread crumbs
4 cups Bread; 1 cup crumbs
14 Graham crackers; 1 cup crumbs
22 Vanilla wafers; 1 cup crumbs
------------------------------------MEAT------------------------------------
4 1/2 cups Chicken, cooked/diced; 1-1/2 lb
1 cup Whole milk = 1/2 cup evaporated milk + 1/2 cup water, or 1 cup reconstituted nonfat dry milk and 1 tablespoon butter
